goal: Repoint the factory gap analyzer to the namespace-local serving implementation instead of the legacy top-level intelligence_server alias.
constraints: Preserve gap-analyzer behavior and generated skill output
Do not remove top-level serving compatibility aliases in this tranche
behavioral_changes: gap_analyzer.py now imports build_skill from the namespace-local intelligence-serving implementation.
Top-level serving aliases remain in place for compatibility elsewhere.
Factory behavior is unchanged; only the internal import path is tightened.
verification_targets: PYTHONPATH=src python -c "from chip_labs.chip_factory.gap_analyzer import improve_chip; from chip_labs.intelligence_serving.intelligence_server import build_skill; import chip_labs.cli; print('factory-serving-import-cleanup-ok')"
follow_up: The remaining cleanup work is mostly systematic import tightening and then a packaging decision, not more broad file relocation.
Keep compatibility aliases until internal callers no longer depend on them.
